description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 27th at 1:27pm, Car 1 (weride av) - while in autonomous mode -  was making a legal, protected, left turn from Coleman Ave. 
Car 1, turning onto W Hedding St., performed the turn from the second lane from the left and was travelling 11 mph when Car 1 then 
slowed down while still in the intersection. It is at this time Car 1's safety driver disengaged Car 1 from autonomous mode by using the 
throttle; this put car 1 into manual mode. It is at this time when car 2 (Ford f-150 XLT), traveling at 18 mph and also making a left turn 
from Coleman Ave within the same lane as car 1, struck and rear ended car 1 while both cars were still in the intersection.
 Car 1 sustained minor damage to its rear bumper and car 2 sustained minor damage to front bumper. Both parties pulled over to exchange 
information.
Car 2 did not provide Registration and Insurance for their respective car. Car 2's driver did give us driver's license information but the driver 
of the vehicle (car 2) at the time of the incident was a different person than that represented on the driver's license presented.
Print
Clear Form
